article.title: 5 Rejections in last 1 month
article.content:
College: Tier 1
Current company: Top PBC
Compensation: 41 (21 fixed + rest in stocks)
Experience: 3.5 years

Started preparing for a job switch in September 2024 and began applying in November. I've had 5 interview loops, including with 2 companies from (MAANGMULA), but got rejected every time. I was close to offers but messed up in any one of the round. Feeling a bit low, just venting here. Was consistent with my preparations for the last 4-5 months but nothing clicks, taking some time off and will be coming back stronger.

post.content: +1 I started last year march , but i have had 3-4 inetrviews got rejected . And now not even getting calls
